response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack software craftsman with ~15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices, plus some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the role is a Director-level IC Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and engineering leadership at scale — none of which is evidenced in the resume. AI experience appears recent and peripheral, with no track record of shaping cloud/AI strategy, advising strategic customers, or leading technical direction at the principal level.
strengths: Long, varied hands-on engineering tenure across full stack, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong software craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus community teaching and workshops
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research output expected of a recognized AI expert
No evidence of Principal/Director-level IC scope: strategy-setting, advising strategic customers, or org-wide influence
Limited cloud platform depth (some AWS CDK) and no demonstrated cloud product strategy work

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
No Principal/Director-level strategy or external advisory track record
Solid breadth and longevity of hands-on engineering experience
